title: leucanthemum pulverulentum
intro: Leucanthemum pulverulentum, also known as Powdered Oxeye Daisy, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Leucanthemum pulverulentum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Leucanthemum pulverulentum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being.
